bio: Fuerza Regida are a multi-platinum, chart-topping band at the forefront of the cultural wave redefining Música Mexicana. The San Bernardino–born group carries their Mexican identity into everything they do, connecting deeply with a new generation of listeners across the U.S., Latin America, and Europe.
